questions.question_text:
In this task, you and your partner will simultaneously vote between two options: a Safe option (S) and a Risky option (R).

The Safe option pays ${{ safe_value }} to both you and your partner.

The Risky option is a lottery. A fair coin is tossed, and the payoffs depend on the correlation type:
{{ correlation_description }}

The Risky option is selected if and only if BOTH of you vote for it. If either of you votes for the Safe option, the Safe option is selected.

{{ info_description }}

Please vote:
